title: STAR - Enigma Multi-Stage RAG Document Intelligence
content:
Project: Enigma Multi-Stage RAG Pipeline for Document Intelligence

Situation:
- Analyst teams faced growing document review volume in business intelligence workflows.
- Manual review effort and turnaround times were becoming operational bottlenecks.

Task:
- Design a production-ready pipeline that could automate high-volume document understanding while preserving output quality and confidence controls.

Action:
- Implemented a staged pipeline covering document pre-processing, retrieval-augmented extraction, and confidence-based routing.
- Tuned retrieval quality with chunking and metadata-aware retrieval strategy.
- Added validation layers and fallback handling to reduce hallucination and extraction errors.
- Improved throughput using async or parallel processing patterns in pipeline execution.

Result:
- Source-reported reduction in analyst review burden and faster document processing cycles.
- Deployed as a production workflow pattern aligned to reliability, quality, and operational visibility goals.
